title: CustomMc
description: CustomMc is a lightweight client mod that lets you personalize Minecraft’s UI, including the window title, loading text, title screen buttons/background, and an in-game watermark, all from an in-game config screen.
body:
# CustomMc

CustomMc is a client-side customization mod focused on one thing: giving you full control over how Minecraft looks and feels — without touching game files or manually editing resource packs.

Everything is configurable directly in-game with a simple and intuitive config menu.

---

## What You Can Customize

• Window title text  
• Loading overlay text  
• Main menu button positions  
• Button sizes  
• Button labels  
• Button visibility  
• Main menu logo visibility  
• Splash text visibility  
• Custom title screen background image (PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF — including animated GIFs)  
• In-game watermark text and placement  

---

## Built-In Visual Editors

No manual file editing required.

You can:

• Drag and place main menu buttons directly on screen  
• Move watermark text visually  
• See changes in real time  
• Save everything instantly to config  

---

## Why Use CustomMc?

• Fast setup with in-game editing  
• No vanilla file patching  
• Fully client-side  
• Great for personal themes  
• Perfect for creator branding  
• Ideal for custom client aesthetics  

---

Client-side only.  
Safe to use on servers.  
Does not modify gameplay.
